title: Chest imaging report
content:
EXAMINATION:  CHEST (PORTABLE AP)

INDICATION:  ___ pulm edema + PNA  // interval change      interval change

COMPARISON:  Prior chest radiographs since ___, most recently ___
and ___.

IMPRESSION: 

Progressive worsening of consolidation in the left upper and middle lung zones
consistent with worsening pneumonia.  Moderate concurrent pulmonary edema has
also progressed.  Severe cardiomegaly probably unchanged.  No pneumothorax. 
Pleural effusions are presumed, but not large.
